scripts.build: npm run lint:all && next build && cd services/engine && npm run build
scripts.build:prod: NODE_ENV=production next build && cd services/engine && npm run build
scripts.start:all: concurrently -n mock,engine,ui -c yellow,blue,green "npm run svc:mock-api" "cd services/engine && npm start" "npx next start -p 3001"
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint && cd services/engine && npm run lint
scripts.lint:fix:all: npm run lint:fix && cd services/engine && npm run lint:fix
scripts.dev:mock: dotenv -e .env.mock -- concurrently --restart-tries 3 --restart-after 2000 -n mock,engine,ui -c yellow,blue,green "npm run svc:mock-api" "cd services/engine && npm run dev" "npx next dev -p 3001"
scripts.dev:mock:3svc: dotenv -e .env.mock -- concurrently --restart-tries 3 --restart-after 2000 -n mock,engine,ui -c yellow,blue,green "npm run svc:mock-api" "cd services/engine && npm run dev" "npx next dev -p 3001"
scripts.dev: dotenv -e .env.dev -- concurrently --restart-tries 3 --restart-after 2000 -n engine,ui -c blue,green "cd services/engine && npm run dev" "npx next dev -p 3001"
scripts.dev:mssql: dotenv -e .env.dev -- concurrently --restart-tries 3 --restart-after 2000 -n engine,mssql,ui -c blue,cyan,green "cd services/engine && npm run dev" "cd services/mssql-connector && npm run dev" "npx next dev -p 3001"
scripts.dev:oracle: dotenv -e .env.dev -- concurrently --restart-tries 3 --restart-after 2000 -n engine,oracle,ui -c blue,magenta,green "cd services/engine && npm run dev" "cd services/oracle-connector && npm run dev" "npx next dev -p 3001"
scripts.dev:sql: dotenv -e .env.dev -- concurrently --restart-tries 3 --restart-after 2000 -n mock,engine,mssql,oracle,ui -c yellow,blue,cyan,magenta,green "npm run svc:mock-api" "cd services/engine && npm run dev" "cd services/mssql-connector && npm run dev" "cd services/oracle-connector && npm run dev" "npx next dev -p 3001"
scripts.start:demo: dotenv -e .env.mock -- concurrently -n mock,engine,ui -c yellow,blue,green "npm run svc:mock-api" "cd services/engine && npm start" "npx next start -p 3001"
scripts.start:prod: dotenv -e .env.prod -- concurrently -n engine,ui -c blue,green "cd services/engine && npm start" "npx next start -p 3001"
